subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory! Thou hast ever been beneath the gaze of My loving-kindness, to which My Pen, My Tongue and My people bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی قد کنت تحت لحاظ عنایتی یشهد بذلک قلمی و لسانی و اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
